2359040.name: Deep Pockets
2359040.description:
Welcome to the backwater town of Dirtville. There is little else here but a small and thriving mining industry, and you've come here to earn your keep! With nothing but a pair of worn-out overalls to your name, you will have to ferry your stones and precious minerals with nothing but your tattered pockets to make your profit. This is the start of your rags to riches story. Load up, keep your footing, and show Dirtville what having deep pockets really means.

A fully simulated Inventory

In Deep Pockets, every item you collect gets dropped into your pocket, where it has to make space among all the other pebbles, dirt, consumable items and junk you might have in there. Even the slightest movement will jostle your pockets; and if they're too full, you might also lose a few things.

Build out the town

As you progress, you unlock new construction projects at the warehouse. Put your resources into building new buildings, and you will unlock new ways to play the game. This is how you put dirtville on the map.

Open-ended immersive gameplay

Play any way you like. Between the various buildings and upgrade you unlock, you will acquire exciting new tools to increase your productivity.
2359040.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
